title: Addiction Its A Family Matter Who Cares
company: family members in the face of their loved one’s struggle with addiction, through dramatic monologue, autobiography and poetry. This presentation shows the ways addiction reaches into and disrupts the lives of all those related to the addicted person, who may be their child, parent, sibling, partner.
description: Jim OrfordChristine HollywoodCharles AntonyKate DysonSeamus Fox
content_warnings: The material presented will be personally relevant to some members of the audience and may be experienced as upsetting
